creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=1e4185284275e80a105f00bae3d0d3f76e9fee0f

commit 1e4185284275e80a105f00bae3d0d3f76e9fee0f
Author:     Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu>
AuthorDate: 2024-01-23 07:40:34 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-01-25 17:18:11 +0000

    net-p2p/readarr: Update to 0.3.15.2376

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Readarr/Readarr/releases/tag/v0.3.16.2387

     * Fixed: Replacing 'appName' translation token
     * Check Content-Type in FileList parser
     * Sort Custom Filters
     * Improved http timeout handling
     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Fixed: Cutoff unmet showing Unmonitored books
     * Fixed: Wanted Missing showing Unmonitored books
     * Bump version to 0.3.16

    PR:             276538
    Reported by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)

 net-p2p/readarr/distinfo  |  6 +++---
 net-p2p/readarr/pkg-plist | 12 ++++++------
 3 files changed, 10 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)
